name: robot-de-figma
description: Figma API Ingestor Bot — Descarga el mapa de componentes desde la API oficial de Figma

scripts.build:pilot: npm run deep:fetch && npm run generate:react && npm run export:tailwind && npm run generate:preview && npm run visualize
scripts.build:massive: npm run deep:fetch && npm run generate:react && npm run export:tailwind
